question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/health/ImporterLagHealthIndicator.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: health()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a total network shutdown by flooding the Prometheus endpoint with slow/hanging responses that exceed the timeout, causing the catch block to swallow the error and always return UP, permanently masking a real DOWN state and preventing any failover that would restore transaction confirmation?
